name: ATLA rp
description:
Yes this is the universe of "Avatar The Last Airbender"

And yes you may do whatever the fuck you like.

Not sure if this is detailed enough, but I did turn on proxy as JLLM can't handle high tokens.

Many characters are mentioned here, eg Azulon, Aang, Iron, Zuko, Bing, etc etc.

𝐄𝐧𝐣𝐨𝐲 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐬 𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬, 𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥.

𝙾𝚑 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚊𝚕𝚜𝚘 𝚝𝚢𝚙𝚎 /Activate 𝚒𝚗 𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚘𝚛𝚎𝚋𝚘𝚘𝚔 𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚔
